feature_name: ChatGPT-powered trip planner in Expedia app
description: Conversational ChatGPT-powered trip planning experience in the iOS app to research destinations, stays and activities, plus an Expedia plugin for ChatGPT.
AI-powered travel companion that plans, books, joins SMS group chats, learns preferences and re-routes when disruptions happen; launched at EXPLORE Spring Release.
Expedia's AI scans Instagram/TikTok travel Reels saved by users and matches them to bookable hotels and activities on the platform.
Expedia launched one of the first ChatGPT plugins so travelers could plan trips and view Expedia inventory directly inside OpenAI's ChatGPT.
Conversational AI trip planner in the US app built on Booking ML models plus OpenAI's GPT API, providing destination, hotel and itinerary suggestions.

feature_name: Smart Filter, Property Q&A, Review Summaries
description: GenAI features let travelers describe ideal stays in natural language, ask property-specific questions, and read AI-distilled review summaries.
First customer-facing agentic AI tools for partner-to-guest communication, automating replies and streamlining cancellations and complaints.
Priceline's OpenAI-powered Penny chatbot helps users search and book, later upgraded with voice capabilities in October 2024.
Priceline upgraded Penny with real-time voice conversation capabilities so customers can speak naturally with the AI travel agent.
Initial AI trip planning assistant launched in Trip.com app providing conversational recommendations.
Upgraded conversational AI assistant supporting text/voice queries, image responses and trip planning, built on Trip.com's own LLM stack.
Trip.com unveiled its own travel-specific LLM 'Wendao' trained on 20 billion travel-relevant data points to underpin its AI products.
TripGenie added an AI menu assistant that translates and explains foreign restaurant menus via photo input, plus real-time voice translation.
Revamped iOS/Android widget offering AI-driven, context-aware recommendations based on trip phase.
Airbnb acquired GamePlanner.AI (founded by Siri co-creator Adam Cheyer) for ~$200M to accelerate AI projects and concierge-like interface.
Airbnb began quietly rolling out an AI customer support agent in the US, handling refunds, booking changes and account issues across 13 models.

feature_name: AI-powered host onboarding and review summaries
description: Summer 2026 release added AI auto-fill for listing details from an address, plus AI-generated guest review summaries with category tags.
Agoda began deploying generative AI internally in 2023 for hotel content generation and review summaries; teams launched 119 GenAI applications that year.
Agoda deployed a Content Enhancement Tool using ML/AI to upscale, deduplicate and re-rank 450M+ property images across 6M listings.
Agoda rolled out an in-funnel property Q&A chatbot using GenAI to answer specific guest questions about hotels and inform filter design.
Kayak became one of the launch partners for OpenAI's ChatGPT plugin program, letting users search flights, hotels and cars conversationally.
Kayak's PriceCheck feature lets travelers upload screenshots of competing fares for the AI to verify and find cheaper alternatives.
Major platform refresh featuring AI-driven search, personalized recommendations and AI-powered discovery feed targeting non-travel bookings.
Traveloka leveraged AI/ML for real-time price updates, dynamic pricing and predictive analytics to boost airline-partner conversion.
AI-powered multilingual trip-planning assistant supporting voice/text in English, Hindi and Hinglish; later expanded to 8 Indian languages.
Strategic AI partnership using OpenAI APIs to power conversational booking and high-intent travel discovery inside the Myra interface.
Major Myra upgrade enables full voice booking with integrated payments across 8 Indian languages; ~3M conversations per quarter.
Mastercard chose India and MakeMyTrip's Myra to introduce its global AI-powered concierge service.

feature_name: Google Cloud GenAI for content localization
description: Klook tapped Google Cloud's PaLM 2 / Vertex AI to translate and localize merchant listings into 10 languages and power K.AI chatbot.

feature_name: K.AI trip planner and shopping guide
description: Expanded Google Cloud partnership powering Klook's K.AI chatbot, content generation and AI-driven 'shopping guide' for comparing experiences.
eDreams partnered with Google Cloud as a generative-AI trusted tester to build LLM-powered agents across inspiration, booking and service.

feature_name: Proprietary AI Trip Planner + ChatGPT app
description: Launched in-app AI Trip Planner generating day-by-day itineraries and integrated a ChatGPT app for agentic conversational booking.
App-exclusive Savvy Search powered by OpenAI generates up to three curated destination recommendations from natural-language prompts.
Skyscanner launched a ChatGPT app letting US/UK travelers search live flights in plain language and refine with follow-up messages.
Yanolja revealed AI-driven travel platform serving 150K B2B clients and 30K hotels at Web Summit 2024, with personalized inventory and pricing.
First Korean travel platform to adopt OpenAI's ChatGPT Enterprise across operations, supporting product and customer service workflows.

feature_name: Vicker AI and Tella multilingual voice agent
description: Yanolja NEXT introduced Vicker AI (generates visual lodging content) and Tella (multilingual voice AI handling calls in 20+ languages).
TripGenie expanded with multi-modal voice/photo input, live translation and broader AI agent reach across 200+ countries.
Booking publicly chose OpenAI over Google Bard as its GenAI partner, integrating GPT models with proprietary inventory and pricing data.

feature_name: Launch partner for OpenAI Apps SDK
description: Booking became a launch partner for OpenAI's Apps SDK, gaining access to 800M weekly active ChatGPT users.

feature_name: Out of Office corporate AI policy engine
description: OOO corporate travel tool uses configurable policy/AI engine to manage self-booking and policy adherence across SME and large enterprise clients.
Yatra's Corporate Self Booking platform uses AI to personalize fares and policy compliance; positioned for integration into Globe Travels' base.
EaseMyTrip rolled out a ChatGPT-powered itinerary planner generating personalized recommendations from natural-language prompts.
Goibibo (MakeMyTrip Group) integrated AI/ML chat capabilities for hotel discovery and policy compliance through Myra-derived tech.
Under new CEO Götz Reinhardt, Kiwi.com began leveraging AI for customer service automation and NDC-based flight product offerings.

feature_name: AI investment from Series D funding
description: Allocated portion of $70M Series D toward AI/R&D projects supporting recommendations, content generation and operational efficiency.
GC Company expanded AI personalization in its Yeogi Eottae app to recommend stays based on user behavior and seasonal demand.
Etraveli's fintech arm launched PRECISION, an ML-driven payment fraud and risk management solution for online travel transactions.
Booking and OpenAI launched a program to train 20,000 European SMEs in applied AI skills for productivity gains.

feature_name: Launch partner for OpenAI Apps SDK
description: Expedia served as a launch partner for OpenAI's Apps SDK, embedding Expedia search inside ChatGPT for 800M weekly users.

feature_name: AI Trip Planner agentic itinerary tool
description: Trip.com Group unveiled new AI Trip Planner targeting the inspiration and planning phase with end-to-end agentic itinerary creation.
Agoda launched AI-generated brand film and personalized ad campaigns (e.g. featuring Ayushmann Khurrana) using GenAI creative tools.

feature_name: AI Trip Planner update with proactive itineraries
description: Booking.com refreshed its AI Trip Planner with proactive itinerary building, broader markets, and deeper integration with bookings.
Yanolja joined OpenAI's Operator research preview as a global launch partner so the agent can book travel and shop on Yanolja.
MakeMyTrip rolled out 'Gia' AI assistant for hotel discovery, leveraging GenAI for natural-language search and customer service.
Klook reported 30% lift in conversion from AI-powered personalization, plus 80% faster content production using Google Cloud GenAI.
Airbnb's AI customer service assistant reached 40%+ resolution rate without human handoff, up from one-third the prior quarter.
Booking Holdings CFO disclosed AI-driven customer service tooling reduced cost-per-reservation ~10% while bookings grew.
